Community 9 in IIT Jammu Mechanical Engineering Department:
  Faculty: Rajkumar V
  FundingAgency: Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR), Science and Engineering Research Board
  PhDStudent: ANAND SANKAR M, AQIB FAYAZ, JAIRAM RAIGAR, MOHIT TEACHER, OWAIS NAZIR
  Project: mechanical_engineering:project:Research Project by Dr. Rajkumar V (~74) from Department of 
  ResearchArea: Dr. Rajkumar Velu’s research is centered on additive manufacturing (AM) and advanced materials engineering, with a particular emphasis on the development, processing, and application of polymeric, metallic, and composite materials for high-performance and functional components. His multidisciplinary research integrates experimental and computational approaches to explore the following key areas, 1. Selective laser sintering of reactive polymers, 2. Additive manufacturing of functionally graded structures, 3. Fabrication of multifunctional components using continuous carbon fibre 3D printing, 4. 3D bioprinting for biomedical and energy applications
  Relationships: RESEARCHES_IN: 10, PRINCIPAL_INVESTIGATOR: 1, SUPERVISED_BY: 5, PI_IS: 1, FUNDED_BY: 1
